sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Mawhna pan hong tatkhiat na’ng in, Jesuh’n Asi pha hong bua khin;
ding, A dikna la’n sa nuam sing maw;
Ni bang ka tang den ding,
Ni bang ka tang den ding.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Vanglian tokhom tungah tu a, Itna mel pua in a omna;
La in sa sa nuam ing, A liatna leh a hoih
Thangsak tawntung nuam ing Thangsak tawntung nuam

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Lungnop ni hong tun tak ciang, Topa’n hong ciah pih ding a kiang;
Hong honpa Jesuh ka lawm tawh;
